# Livecaller Guides

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/getting-started.md)
- [Services](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services.md)
- [Online Chat](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/online-chat.md)
- [Chat Integration](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/online-chat/chat-integration.md): This document helps you easily add the LiveCaller widget to your website.
- [AI Assistant](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/ai-assistant.md)
- [Workspace](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/ai-assistant/workspace.md): A workspace is a primary container associated with a specific AI provider. Each workspace is linked to only one particular provider.
- [Integrations](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/ai-assistant/integrations.md): Integration is the connection between your workspace and a specific AI model. This determines which AI model your assistant will use for text generation.
- [Knowledge Base](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/ai-assistant/knowledge-base.md)
- [Training Data](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/ai-assistant/training-data.md): Adding training data to the knowledge base.
- [AI Assistants](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/ai-assistant/ai-assistants.md)
- [AI credits payment model](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/ai-assistant/ai-credits-payment-model.md)
- [AI Interactions](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/ai-assistant/ai-interactions.md)
- [Integrations](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/integrations.md)
- [Facebook Messenger](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/integrations/facebook-messenger.md)
- [Client Feedback Template](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/integrations/facebook-messenger/client-feedback-template.md)
- [Managing Meta Data](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/integrations/facebook-messenger/managing-meta-data.md)
- [WhatsApp](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/integrations/whatsapp.md): Connect your WhatsApp to LiveCaller.
- [Instagram](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/integrations/instagram.md): Connect your Instagram to LiveCaller.
- [Email](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/integrations/email.md): Connect your email to LiveCaller.
- [Viber](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/integrations/viber.md): Connect your Viber bot to LiveCaller.
- [Telegram](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/integrations/telegram.md): Connect your Telegram bot to LiveCaller.
- [Business Phone – PBX](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/business-phone-pbx.md)
- [Web Phone](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/business-phone-pbx/web-phone.md)
- [Devices](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/business-phone-pbx/devices.md)
- [Numbers](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/business-phone-pbx/numbers.md)
- [Queues](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/business-phone-pbx/queues.md)
- [Flows](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/business-phone-pbx/flows.md)
- [Chatbot](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/chatbot.md)
- [Event](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/chatbot/event.md)
- [Condition](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/chatbot/condition.md)
- [Action](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/chatbot/action.md)
- [Knowledge Base](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/knowledge-base.md)
- [Co-Browsing](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/co-browsing.md): Listen to and guide online visitors.
- [Online Call](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/services/online-call.md)
- [Live Panel](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/live-panel.md)
- [Tags Attach / Detach](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/live-panel/tags-attach-detach.md)
- [Inbox](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/inbox.md)
- [Current Sessions](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/current-sessions.md)
- [Session Transfer](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/session-transfer.md)
- [Session Report](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/session-report.md)
- [Working Hours](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/working-hours.md): Working Hours allow you to adjust your daily work schedule.
- [Template Responses](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/template-responses.md)
- [Widget Management](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/widget-management.md): How to Install and Manage the Online Chat Widget on a Website.
- [Pre-chat Survey](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/widget-management/pre-chat-survey.md): It is used to collect user information before starting the chat.
- [Multilingual Translation](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/widget-management/multilingual-translation.md)
- [Message Typing Preview](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/widget-management/message-typing-preview.md)
- [Blocking](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/blocking.md)
- [Mobile SDKs](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/mobile-sdks.md)
- [WebView iOS SwiftUI](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/mobile-sdks/webview-ios-swiftui.md)
- [WebView Flutter](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/mobile-sdks/webview-flutter.md)
- [WebView Kotlin](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/mobile-sdks/webview-kotlin.md)
- [Mobile app - iOS, Android](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/mobile-app-ios-android.md)
- [Bug Reporting](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/onboarding/bug-reporting.md)
- [PWA](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/onboarding/pwa.md)
- [Permissions Management](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/security/permissions-management.md)
- [Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/security/two-factor-authentication-2fa.md)
- [Security Logs](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/security/security-logs.md)
- [Javascript API](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/widget-api/javascript-api.md)
- [CSS](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/widget-api/css.md)
- [Clearing the Browser Cache](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/faq/clearing-the-browser-cache.md)
- [Web call does not work?](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/faq/web-call-does-not-work.md)
- [How to change or translate widget texts?](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/faq/how-to-change-or-translate-widget-texts.md)
- [How to remove "powered by livecaller.io"?](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/faq/how-to-remove-powered-by-livecaller.io.md)
- [Timezone issues](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/faq/timezone-issues.md)
- [Does Livecaller support startups?](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/faq/does-livecaller-support-startups.md)
- [What is the duration for which information history is retained?](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/faq/what-is-the-duration-for-which-information-history-is-retained.md)
- [How to install?](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/faq/how-to-install.md): Heads up, if you are not familiar with or haven't used Google Tag Manager before: https://support.google.com/tagmanager/answer/6103696
- [Other Questions](https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/faq/other-questions.md)


---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.livecaller.io/livecaller/getting-started.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
